title: Question: More than a 8k bit replication is probably wrong
body:
---


Author Name: **Paul Rolfe**
Original Redmine Message: 1768 from https://www.veripool.org



---

Hi,

We have a module block that has an :
input    [FRED:0]  data_in

where FRED is 9000

We assign an initial value to register using :

reg1 <= {FRED{1'b0}};

but this generates an error : "More than a 8k bit replication is probably wrong"

Is there a way to adjust the limit on this condition ?

Many Thanks

Paul
